name: agentic-dev-sandbox
title: joaopn/agentic-dev-sandbox
setup: RS_PROJ="$(hostname)" python3 -c 'import os; p="docker-compose.yml"; s=open(p).read(); m="/proxy/"+os.environ["RS_PROJ"]+"/port-"; old="GITEA__server__ROOT_URL=http://localhost:${GITEA_PORT:-3000}"; new=old+"/proxy/"+os.environ["RS_PROJ"]+"/port-${GITEA_PORT:-3000}/"; open(p,"w").write(s.replace(old,new,1)) if (m not in s and old in s) else None'
description: An agentic software development sandbox with an integrated Gitea server.
